variable: vvrecf precompute sig before scalar loop
notes: T3: precompute sig=1/(1+exp(-h1)) via vvrecf before scalar loop, eliminating scalar fdiv from 1M-element hot loop. Applied to all 3 backward fns. Improvement within bench noise (~8ms) but confirmed via profile_single_layer. All tests pass. auto_vectorize_silu_recip.rs protects invariant.

result: ~3.4ms/layer sigmoid chain hidden behind ANE dispatch
notes: T5: moves vsmul+expf+vsadd+recf into existing ffnBwdW2t async block. Sigmoid chain (~0.6ms/layer) now overlaps ANE run instead of running sequentially after it. 138→134ms (~3% faster)

variable: pre-create 6 shared Metal scalar bufs in begin_batch()
notes: T5: 56×8=448 → 6+56×2=118 Metal buffer allocs per Adam step. beta1/beta2/eps/bc1/bc2/grad_scale cached in begin_batch(). ~2ms/step improvement (1.5%, within noise). Consistent across 5 bench runs. All 4 custom tests pass.

T2: softcap=0.0 skips vvtanhf on 4M logits (fwd) + tanh derivative loop (bwd). Regression introduced when phase5/auto-opt-alpha branch was created from pre-f085471 base. auto_restore_softcap_zero.rs protects invariant. 4 custom tests pass.

variable: move kvBwd staging into qBwd async CPU block
notes: T8: profiler shows qBwd async = 0.86ms (ANE-bound: ANE 0.86ms > CPU 0.69ms). Adding staging (0.4ms) to CPU block exceeds ANE time → CPU-bound → staging overhead cancels staging savings. Step 13 wall +0.23ms × 6 ≈ +1.4ms, step 14 saves 0.4ms × 6 ≈ -2.4ms, but bench shows net 0. Confirmed: step 13 is co-bottleneck; headroom insufficient.

T10: bwd unchanged at 69-70ms. cblas_saxpy BLAS dispatch overhead cancels memory savings vs vDSP_vadd+copy_from_slice. Apple M4: vDSP_vadd is highly vectorized; 1.5MB dx2_tmp is L2-resident so copy cost is trivial. Insight: for L2-resident buffers, extra vadd+copy cheaper than BLAS dispatch.

T11: thread::scope spawn overhead (~20μs × 60 calls = 1.2ms) + IOSurface cache coherence negates any bandwidth gain. IOSurface writes don't parallelize with 2 CPU threads — memory path appears serialized at IOSurface level. Insight: IOSurface staging is a hard sequential bottleneck; parallelism at CPU level does not help. stage_ffn_bwd_w13t=2.27ms is likely fixed cost of IOSurface channel-interleaved format.

variable: move accumulate_dw(dWv) from qBwd async to sdpaBwd2 async
notes: T12: dWv sgemm moves to sdpaBwd2 async (earlier window, dv_full available from sdpaBwd1). bwd improves ~1ms but total step unchanged due to fwd noise. Insight: each dWv sgemm takes ~0.29ms (faster than estimated); qBwd CPU block ~0.88ms for 3 sgemm (ANE qBwd ~0.3ms — very CPU-bound but small absolute savings). sdpaBwd2 ANE bound absorbs dWv overlap cleanly. Remaining gap: ffnBwdW13t staging 2.27ms/layer hard wall; need architectural change (fused 2-layer ANE or layout change).

variable: fuse vdsp::vadd+copy into rmsnorm backward pass-2 inner loop
notes: T13: eliminated 2 separate vadd+copy_from_slice passes per layer in backward_into (step 6 + steps 15-16). Added backward_channel_first_with_add fusing addend into pass-2. Bench unchanged at 128-129ms. Root cause: 1.5MB dx2 arrays are L2-resident; L2 bandwidth ~600GB/s makes vadd+copy trivially fast (~0.01ms each, not ~0.08ms from DRAM estimate). Insight: L2-resident buffer copies are effectively free on M4 Max. 3 correctness tests passed before revert.

variable: overlap kvBwd ANE with qBwd CPU dW scope
notes: T5: moved wkt/wvt transposes to sdpaBwd2 overlap. Pre-staged kvBwd before qBwd scope. Combined qBwd+kvBwd on ANE thread while CPU computes dWq/dWk/dWv. kvBwd ANE time (~0.5ms/layer) now hidden behind CPU dW. auto_fuse_qbwd_kvbwd.rs protects invariant (3 tests).

variable: replace SiLU scalar loop with 7 vDSP ops
notes: T14: replaced fused single-pass scalar loop (auto-vectorized by LLVM) with 7 separate vDSP calls (vmul/vadd/vsub). Multi-pass approach has 3.5x more memory traffic (84MB vs 24MB over 1M elements). Scalar loop keeps intermediates in registers; vDSP forces memory round-trips per op. Insight: for L2-resident data with fused compute, LLVM auto-vectorization beats explicit vDSP decomposition.

variable: move ffnFused weight staging from woFwd overlap to sdpaFwd overlap
notes: T14: woFwd overlap was CPU-bound (staging 1.2ms > ANE 0.5ms). sdpaFwd has 2ms ANE headroom, absorbs 1.5ms staging. woFwd now pure ANE (0.28ms). per-layer fwd: ~6.8→6.1ms. auto_fwd_rebalance_staging.rs protects invariant (3 tests).
